title: UK Board Date Sheet 2026 Overview

detail.title: UK Board Date Sheet 2026 Overview
detail.short_info: UK Board Date Sheet 2026 is out for Class 10 and 12. Check UBSE exam dates from February–March 2026 and download the official timetable PDF from ubse.uk.gov.in in this detailed guide.

content.text: The UK Board Date Sheet 2026 is out for Class 10 and Class 12, released by the Uttarakhand Board of School Education (UBSE). Students can download the complete timetable PDF from the official website ubse.uk.gov.in under the “Examination Scheme/Date Sheet” section.

The Uttarakhand Board of School Education (UBSE) will conduct the UK Board 10th and 12th exams 2026 between February and March 2026 at various centres across the state. This guide provides the complete UK Board Date Sheet 2026, subject-wise schedule, download steps, admit card details, exam instructions, preparation tips, and key links for students and parents.

rows: UK Board High School & Intermediate Examination 2026

content.text: Exam Timings: Most theory exams are held from 10:00 AM to 1:00 PM (or 1:15 PM in some cases), in a single shift.
Download UK Board Date Sheet 2026 PDF – Class 10 & 12 (Visit the official site and navigate to Examination Scheme for the latest PDFs).
Here is the complete subject-wise UK Board Class 10 timetable 2026 for theory exams:

rows: Home Science (Subject 1 only for girls, and Subject 2 for boys and girls who have opted as compulsory), Urdu, Hindustani Music (Vocal), Hindustani Music (Percussion)
Ranjan Kala, Business Element, Ledger Account and Accountancy, Agriculture

content.text: Note: Refer to the official PDF for any subject codes, additional guidelines, or minor variations.
The UK Board Class 12 timetable 2026 covers streams like Science, Commerce, Arts, and vocational subjects. Here is the complete subject-wise schedule:

rows: Hindustani Music (Vocal), Hindustani Music (Percussion Instruments), Hindustani Music
Psychology, Agricultural Physics & Climatology Third Paper (Part-I), Agricultural Zoology, Sociology, Mathematics
Political Science, Physics, Agro Botany Second Question Paper (Part I), Agriculture Economics
Sociology, Chemistry, Agricultural Engineering Fourth Paper (Part I), Animal Husbandry and Veterinary Ninth Paper
Geography, Accountancy, Geology, Agricultural Mathematics and Primary Statistics Fifth Paper (Part I), Agricultural Chemistry Tenth Paper (Part II)

content.text: Note: Stream-specific combinations apply; check the official PDF for exact paper parts and codes.

sections.heading: How to Download UK Board Date Sheet 2026?

items: Visit the official UBSE website: ubse.uk.gov.in.
On the homepage, navigate to the “Examination Scheme” or “Date Sheet” section.
Look for links like “UBSE High School Examination Scheme 2026” or “UBSE Intermediate Examination Scheme 2026”.
Click the relevant link to open the PDF.
Download and save the PDF for reference.
Carry your admit card and school ID to every exam; no entry without it.
Reach the exam centre at least 30 minutes before the start time.
Use the reading time to carefully read the question paper and follow invigilator rules.
No mobile phones, smartwatches, or unfair means allowed—violation can lead to cancellation.
Double-check subject codes and dates to avoid confusion.

content.text: Admit cards are typically issued in late January or early February 2026 through schools. Regular students collect them from their schools, while private candidates check the official website or exam centres. The admit card includes name, roll number, centre, subjects, and dates.
Check/Download UK Board Admit Card 2026 (once released).

items: Create a balanced timetable with time for all subjects and regular revision.
Practice previous year papers and sample questions to master the pattern.
Stick to NCERT/board textbooks; highlight key formulas, definitions, and diagrams.
Take timed mock tests to improve speed and accuracy.
Prioritize sleep, healthy eating, and avoid cramming new topics last-minute.
